data.content:
Use `dotnet watch test` — it re-runs tests automatically on every file save, no manual rebuild needed:

```bash
dotnet watch test --filter "ProcessPayment_NegativeAmount_ThrowsException"
```

The fix is that `ProcessPayment` doesn't validate negative amounts (line 29). Add `<= 0` instead of `== 0`:

```csharp
if (amount <= 0) throw new ArgumentException("Amount cannot be zero");
```

Want me to start `dotnet watch test` and apply the fix so you can see it pass live?
